title: Simple website with a button

requirements.text: Create a single-page website that renders a clear primary button on the page.

quotes: make a website with a button

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app loads a single page without errors.
A prominently styled button is visible without scrolling on a typical laptop viewport.
The button has an accessible label in English and is reachable via keyboard tab navigation.

requirements.text: Define a simple button interaction: when the button is clicked, show immediate on-page feedback (e.g., increment a visible click counter or display a short confirmation message).

quotes: make a website with a button

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the button updates the UI immediately without a page reload.
The feedback state is visible near the button and uses English user-facing text.

requirements.text: Apply a coherent visual theme across the page (colors, typography, spacing, and layout) with a distinct style appropriate for a minimal landing page, and keep it consistent.

quotes: make a website with a button

acceptanceCriteria: Page uses a consistent set of colors and typography (not the default unstyled look).
The button styling matches the overall theme (hover/focus states included).
Theme does not rely on blue/purple as the primary palette unless explicitly required (not requested).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead if needed).
Do not modify any files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx (if present).
nonGoals: Backend canister logic or persistent storage.
Multiple pages, routing, or complex navigation.
